title: Gadolinium Phantom MRI Raw Data Acquired with 3D Multi-Echo Cartesian Trajectory
author: Kee, Youngwook
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description:
This repository contains a gadolinium phantom dataset acquired with  3D multi-echo Cartesian MRI (IDEAL-IQ) without motion.  For file I/O and reconstruction, please refer to  https://github.com/MRI-Research/5dLiverMRI-MedIA . 
 There are two other datasets acquired with  3D multi-echo cones MRI  using the same phantom. 
 - With motion:  Part 1/2 ,  Part 2/2  
 - Without motion:  Part 1/2 ,  Part 2/2  
 Details of the imaging parameters can be found from the following publications: 
 -  https://pubmed.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/37392413/  
 -  https://doi.org/10.1016/j.media.2025.103532
